H5600.strongs_def: a (sea-going) vessel (as ceiled with a deck)

H5601.strongs_def: a gem (perhaps used for scratching other substances), probably the sapphire

H5602.derivation: from an unused root meaning to depress;

H5603.strongs_def: to hide by covering; specifically, to roof (passive participle as noun, a roof) or wainscot; figuratively, to reserve

H5605.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to snatch away, i.e. terminate; but used only as denominative from H5592 (סַף) (in the sense of a vestibule),

H5606.derivation: or שָׂפַק; (1 Kings 20:10; Job 27:23; Isaiah 2:6), a primitive root;
H5606.strongs_def: to clap the hands (in token of compact, derision, grief, indignation, or punishment); by implication of satisfaction, to be enough; by implication of excess, to vomit

H5608.strongs_def: properly, to score with a mark as a tally or record, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe, and also to enumerate; intensively, to recount, i.e. celebrate
H5608.kjv_def: commune, (ac-) count; declare, number, [phrase] penknife, reckon, scribe, shew forth, speak, talk, tell (out), writer.
H5608.usage: scribe(50x), tell(40x), declare(24x), number(23x), count(6x), writer(4x), speak(2x), accounted(1x), commune(1x), reckon(1x), shewing(1x), talk(1x)

H5609.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5608 (סָפַר);

H5612.strongs_def: properly, writing (the art or a document); by implication, a book
H5612.kjv_def: bill, book, evidence, [idiom] learn(-ed) (-ing), letter, register, scroll.
H5612.usage: book(138x), letter(29x), evidence(8x), bill(4x), learning(2x), register(1x), scroll(1x)

H5616.strongs_def: a Sepharvite or inhabitant of Sepharvain

H5618.derivation: feminine active participle of H5608 (סָפַר); a scribe (properly, female);

H5619.strongs_def: properly, to be weighty; but used only in the sense of lapidation or its contrary (as if a delapidation)

H5621.derivation: from an unused root meaning to sting;

H5624.derivation: from a primitive root meaning to tremble; trembling;

H5625.strongs_def: a Seredite (collectively) or descendants of Sered

H5627.kjv_def: [idiom] continual, rebellion, revolt(-ed), turn away, wrong.

H5628.kjv_def: exceeding, hand, spread, stretch self, banish.

H5631.derivation: or סָרִס; from an unused root meaning to castrate;
H5631.strongs_def: a eunuch; by implication, valet (especially of the female apartments), and thus, a minister of state

H5633.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H5635.strongs_def: to cremate, i.e. to be (near) of kin (such being privileged to kindle the pyre)

H5636.strongs_def: a nettle (as stinging like a burn)

H5637.strongs_def: to turn away, i.e. (morally) be refractory
H5637.kjv_def: [idiom] away, backsliding, rebellious, revolter(-ing), slide back, stubborn, withdrew.
H5637.usage: rebellious(6x), stubborn(4x), revolters(2x), revolting(1x), backslide(1x), away(1x), withdrew(1x)

H5638.derivation: from an unused root meaning to hide;

H5640.strongs_def: to stop up; by implication, to repair; figuratively, to keep secret
H5640.kjv_def: closed up, hidden, secret, shut out (up), stop.

H5641.strongs_def: to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively
H5641.kjv_def: be absent, keep close, conceal, hide (self), (keep) secret, [idiom] surely.
H5641.usage: hide(72x), secret(4x), close(2x), absent(1x), conceal(1x), surely(1x), variant(1x)

H5643.strongs_def: a cover (in a good or a bad, a literal or a figurative sense)
H5643.kjv_def: backbiting, covering, covert, [idiom] disguise(-th), hiding place, privily, protection, secret(-ly, place).
H5643.usage: secret(12x), secretly(9x), covert(5x), backbiting(1x), covering(1x), disguiseth(1x), privily(1x), protection(1x)

H5645.strongs_def: properly, an envelope, i.e. darkness (or density, 2 Chronicles 4:17); specifically, a (scud) cloud; also a copse
H5645.kjv_def: clay, (thick) cloud, [idiom] thick, thicket. Compare H5672 (עֲבִי).

H5646.derivation: or עֹב; from an unused root meaning to cover; properly, equivalent to H5645 (עָב); but used only as an architectural term,

H5647.strongs_def: to work (in any sense); by implication, to serve, till, (causatively) enslave, etc.
H5647.kjv_def: [idiom] be, keep in bondage, be bondmen, bond-service, compel, do, dress, ear, execute, [phrase] husbandman, keep, labour(-ing man, bring to pass, (cause to, make to) serve(-ing, self), (be, become) servant(-s), do (use) service, till(-er), transgress (from margin), (set a) work, be wrought, worshipper,
H5647.usage: serve(227x), do(15x), till(9x), servant(5x), work(5x), worshippers(5x), service(4x), dress(2x), labour(2x), ear(2x)

H5648.strongs_def: to do, make, prepare, keep, etc.
H5648.kjv_def: [idiom] cut, do, execute, go on, make, move, work.
H5648.usage: do(10x), made(7x), cut(2x), worketh(1x), goeth(1x), kept(1x), moved(1x), wrought(1x)

H5651.strongs_def: Ebed, the name of two Israelites

H5653.strongs_def: Abda, the name of two Israelites

H5654.derivation: from the active participle of H5647 (עָבַד) and H123 (אֱדֹם); worker of Edom;
H5654.strongs_def: Obed-Edom, the name of five Israelites

H5655.derivation: from H5647 (עָבַד) and H410 (אֵל); serving God;

H5656.kjv_def: act, bondage, [phrase] bondservant, effect, labour, ministering(-try), office, service(-ile, -itude), tillage, use, work, [idiom] wrought.
H5656.usage: service(96x), servile(12x), work(10x), bondage(8x), act(2x), serve(2x), servitude(2x), tillage(2x), effect(1x), labour(1x)

H5658.strongs_def: Abdon, the name of a place in Palestine and of four Israelites
H5658.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H5660.strongs_def: Abdi, the name of two Israelites

H5661.derivation: from H5650 (עֶבֶד) and H410 (אֵל); servant of God;

H5662.derivation: or עֹבַדְיָהוּ; active participle of H5647 (עָבַד) and H3050 (יָהּ); serving Jah;
H5662.strongs_def: Obadjah, the name of thirteen Israelites

H5663.derivation: from H5650 (עֶבֶד) and H4428 (מֶלֶךְ); servant of a king;

H5664.strongs_def: Abed-Nego, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions

H5668.derivation: or עָבֻר; passive participle of H5674 (עָבַר);
H5668.strongs_def: properly, crossed, i.e. (abstractly) transit; used only adverbially, on account of, in order that
H5668.kjv_def: because of, for (...'s sake), (intent) that, to.

H5669.strongs_def: passed, i.e. kept over; used only of stored grain

H5670.strongs_def: to pawn; causatively, to lend (on security); figuratively, to entangle
H5670.kjv_def: borrow, break (ranks), fetch (a pledge), lend, [idiom] surely.

H5674.strongs_def: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
H5674.kjv_def: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, gender, get over, (make) go (away, beyond, by, forth, his way, in, on, over, through), have away (more), lay, meddle, overrun, make partition, (cause to, give, make to, over) pass(-age, along, away, beyond, by, -enger, on, out, over, through), (cause to, make) [phrase] proclaim(-amation), perish, provoke to anger, put away, rage, [phrase] raiser of taxes, remove, send over, set apart, [phrase] shave, cause to (make) sound, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] sweet smelling, take (away), (make to) transgress(-or), translate, turn away, (way-) faring man, be wrath.

H5675.strongs_def: {properly, a region across; but used only adverbially (with or without a preposition) on the opposite side (especially of the Jordan; ususally meaning the east)}

H5676.strongs_def: properly, a region across; but used only adverbially (with or without a preposition) on the opposite side (especially of the Jordan; ususally meaning the east)
H5676.kjv_def: [idiom] against, beyond, by, [idiom] from, over, passage, quarter, (other, this) side, straight.
H5676.usage: side(58x), beyond(21x), straight(3x), passage(2x), by(1x), from(1x), other(1x), against(1x), over(1x), quarter(1x)

H5677.strongs_def: Eber, the name of two patriarchs and four Israelites

H5680.strongs_def: an Eberite (i.e. Hebrew) or descendant of Eber

H5683.kjv_def: Hebron. Perhaps a clerical error for H5658 (עַבְדוֹן).

H5688.derivation: or עֲבוֹת; or (feminine) עֲבֹתָה; the same as H5687 (עָבֹת);
H5688.strongs_def: something intwined, i.e. a string, wreath or foliage
H5688.kjv_def: band, cord, rope, thick bough (branch), wreathen (chain).
H5688.usage: wreathen(7x), cords(5x), band(4x), boughs(3x), rope(3x), chains(2x), branches(1x)

H5689.strongs_def: to breathe after, i.e. to love (sensually)

H5693.derivation: passive part (but with active sense) of an unused root meaning to twitter;

H5694.strongs_def: something round, i.e. a ring (for the ears)

H5695.strongs_def: a (male) calf (as frisking round), especially one nearly grown (i.e. a steer)

H5696.derivation: or עָגוֹל; from an unused root meaning to revolve,

H5697.strongs_def: a (female) calf, especially one nearly grown (i.e. a heifer)

H5699.strongs_def: something revolving, i.e. a wheeled vehicle
